fieldValues.value: A conformant implementation MUST accept `"attaches"` as a value of `SourceReference.sourceRole`. An attachment is a `SourceReference` with `sourceType: "repository-document"`, `sourceRole: "attaches"`, and `sourceId` equal to a source document's `documentId`. Attachment MUST NOT be modelled as a `Relation` edge; there is no `attaches` canonical `Relation` type.
Validators, importers; SourceReference-bearing schemas (record.json, note.json, typed-record.json, relations-collection.json)
